title: Breaking: Isuzu launches its first electric pickup truck in the UK market, expanding the E
summary: Isuzu launches its first electric pickup truck in the UK market, expanding the EV commercial vehicle segment though the vehicle carries a premium price point.

title: Battery Revolution Tracker Update — Mon Apr 20, 2026
summary: Isuzu has launched its first electric pickup truck — the D-Max EV — in the UK market, expanding the EV commercial vehicle segment into the competitive pickup category.
